readingLog.description: Personal reading tracker. Essays, communication theory, and the occasional novel. Kept since college, updated most Sundays.

book.title: The Architecture of Belonging
book.author: D. Simone Warren
book.note: Slow on purpose. The chapter on civic trust is doing something to how I think about campaign copy.

book.title: Quiet Rooms, Loud Streets
book.author: Imani Calderon
book.note: Reread the title essay twice. Bought a used copy to lend out.

book.title: The Work of Listening
book.author: Hollis Park
book.note: Dense but useful. Took notes for the messaging templates.

book.title: Small Towns, Long Memories
book.author: Renata Voss
book.note: Read most of it on the bus. Made me homesick for Decatur in a good way.

book.title: The Attention Economy and Its Discontents
book.author: Marcus Lind
book.note: Right ideas, a little smug. Good for one strong pull quote.

book.title: How We Gather Now
book.author: D. Simone Warren
book.reason: Same author, newer collection. Hold for after the gala.

book.title: Letters to a Young Organizer
book.author: Beatrice Ahn
book.reason: Mentioned in the comms peer chat twice this month.

book.title: The Patience of Rivers
book.author: Tomas Reyes
book.reason: A novel for the Portugal flights.
